title: BlogForever D2.4: Weblog spider prototype and associated methodology
author: Rynning, M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The purpose of this document is to present the evaluation of different solutions for capturing blogs, established methodology and to describe the developed blog spider prototype.
steps_raw: The purpose of this document is to present the evaluation of different solutions for capturing blogs, established methodology and to describe the developed blog spider prototype.
